titleStmt.title: The Acting Secretary of State to the Embassy in France

head.hi: The Acting Secretary of State to the Embassy in France

div.p: Gadel 432. For Bohlen from Hickerson. Delga 629 Nov 6.Not Printed. On November 6 Pres approved general principles of Sep 9 document which Secy has and approved next steps indicated Telmar 110 Oct 26. He took Sep 9 paper to Key West for study and any revisions arising from future exploratory talks will naturally be cleared with him. Lovett has touched base with Vandenberg and hopes to do so shortly with Connally. No other Congressional soundings contemplated pending receipt further European views in renewed exploratory talks. Except for conversations with Norwegians and Danes on which memoranda long ago sent Secy and Italians (Deptel 4174 Oct 26Telegram 4174 to Marshall in Paris was a repetition of telegram 2652 of the same date to Italy, p. 267.) we have had no conversations here. NME expecting visit in Dec from Gen Marras Ital Chief of Staff and Ital Emb advises us Gen ReversGen. Georges Marie Joseph Revers, Chief of Staff, French Army. has initiated Franco-Ital mil talks with Admiral Maugeri.Vice-Adm. Francesco Maugeri, Chief of Staff, Italian Navy. No other developments here since you left. In any talks there with Brussels Treaty country reps suggest stressing importance providing satisfactorily for Italy. [Hickerson.]
